messages.content: 翻译接下来我输入的内容为中文
抱歉，我是一个语言模型AI，我只能理解和使用英语。如果你有英文输入，请让我帮忙翻译。

This project used Python 3.8. Python code which was written on a personal computer using the pycharm software. The processor of the computer is AMD R7 4800 H; random access memory size (RAM) is 16 GB. In this project, functions in the sklearn software toolkit are used to normalize hyperspectral data. The numpy toolkit for matrix computations  in algorithmic models was used. The cvxopt toolkit was used to solve convex quadratic programming problems in dual problems.
这个项目使用Python 3.8。Python代码是用pycharm软件在个人电脑上编写的，电脑处理器为AMD R7 4800 H，随机存储器(RAM)大小为16GB。在该项目中，使用了sklearn软件工具包中的函数来归一化高光谱数据。算法模型中的矩阵计算使用了numpy工具包。在双重问题中，使用了cvxopt工具包来解决凸二次规划问题。

The research data are the information of four publicly available hyperspectral scenes.
All these are Earth Observation images taken from the air or satellite.
研究数据是四个公开可用的高光谱场景的信息，这些场景都是从空中或卫星拍摄的地球观测图像。
Salinas-A Dataset 翻译这个词
Salinas-A数据集

The Salinas-A dataset is collected by AVIRIS sensors over the Salinas Valley in Califor- nia, with a band number of 224, a spatial resolution of 3.7 m and a pixel count of 512×217.  It consists of 86 ×83 pixels and includes six categories.  Figure 1 shows the sample band of  the Salinas-A dataset.
Salinas-A数据集是由AVIRIS传感器在加利福尼亚州Salinas Valley上收集的，具有224个波段号，空间分辨率为3.7米，像素数量为512×217。它由86×83个像素组成，包括六个类别。图1显示了Salinas-A数据集的样本波段。
2.2.2.	Pavia Center Datase翻译这个词
Pavia Center数据集。

The Pavia Center dataset was obtained by the ROSIS sensor in Pavia, northern Italy. The number of spectral bands in the Pavia Center is 102. The Pavia Center is an image with 1096 1096 pixels, which contains nine categories. Figure 2 shows the sample band of the Pavia Center dataset.
Pavia Center数据集是由位于意大利北部Pavia的ROSIS传感器获取的。Pavia Center的光谱波段数量为102。Pavia Center是包含九个类别的1096×1096像素图像。图2显示了Pavia Center数据集的样本波段。
请问有什么需要帮忙的吗？
2.2.3.	Pavia University Dataset翻译这个词
Pavia University数据集。

The Pavia University dataset was obtained by the ROSIS sensor in Pavia, northern   Italy. The number of spectral bands in Pavia University is 103.  The University of Pavia is  610 610 pixels and contains nine categories. Figure 3 shows the sample band of the Pavia University dataset.
Pavia University数据集是由位于意大利北部Pavia的ROSIS传感器获取的。Pavia University的光谱波段数量为103。Pavia University是包含九个类别的610×610像素图像。图3显示了Pavia University数据集的样本波段。
Figure 1. Sample band of Salinas-A dataset.
图1. Salinas-A数据集样本波段。
Figure 2. Sample band of Pavia Center dataset.
图2. Pavia Center数据集样本波段。

The Kennedy Space Center dataset was collected by AVIRIS over the Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The number of spectral bands is 224 and the pixel is 512 614. It contains 13 categories. Figure 4 shows the sample band of the Kennedy Space Center dataset.
Kennedy Space Center数据集是由AVIRIS传感器在佛罗里达州的Kennedy Space Center上收集的。它具有224个光谱波段和512×614个像素，包含13个类别。图4显示了Kennedy Space Center数据集的样本波段。

Support vector machines are widely used in hyperspectral image classification. How- ever, the SVM classification mechanism assumes that the datasets are separable in parallel planes.  For real hyperspectral image data, its data distribution makes it difficult to meet   the property of being separable in parallel planes; therefore, using support vector machine classification means losing certain classification accuracy to a certain extent.
支持向量机在高光谱图像分类中被广泛应用。然而，SVM分类机制假设数据集在平行平面上可分。针对实际高光谱图像数据，其数据分布性使得它难以满足平行平面可分的条件；因此，使用支持向量机分类意味着在一定程度上损失一定的分类精度。
Figure 3. Sample band of Pavia University dataset.
图3. Pavia University数据集样本波段。
Figure 4. Sample band of P Kennedy Space Center dataset.
图4. Kennedy Space Center数据集样本波段。

For the problem that the decision plane of support vector machine in hyperspectral image classification makes it difficult to conform to the trend of data distribution, this article proposes a classification method using non-parallel support vector machine to improve the support vector machine. Compared with SVMs, non-parallel SVMs have better decision hyperplane degrees of freedom. The classification hyperplane structure of the non-parallel SVM makes the decision plane more in line with the distribution trend of hyperspectral data, thus obtaining better classification accuracy than SVM.
针对支持向量机在高光谱图像分类中决策平面不易符合数据分布趋势的问题，本文提出了一种使用非平行支持向量机进行分类的方法，以改进支持向量机。与SVM相比，非平行SVM具有更好的决策超平面自由度。非平行SVM的分类超平面结构使得决策平面更符合高光谱数据的分布趋势，从而获得比SVM更好的分类准确率。
2.4.	Support Vector Machine 翻译这个词
支持向量机(Support Vector Machine，SVM)。

For the second-class classification of m data points in n dimensional feature space Rn, the matrix A is used to represent all data points by using m × n, and the No. i data point is Ai(i = 1, 2, . . . , m), Ai = (i = Ai1, Ai2, . . . , Ain)T. Let yi ∈ {1, −1 } represent the category information to which the No. i data point belongs. The m × m diagonal matrix Y
 


is established by using yi as diagonal line, that is, Yii represents the category information to which the Ai data point belongs.
对于n维特征空间Rn中m个数据点的二类分类，通过使用m×n的矩阵A表示所有数据点，并且第i个数据点是Ai(i = 1, 2, ..., m)，Ai = (i = Ai1, Ai2, ..., Ain)T。让yi ∈ {1，-1}表示第i个数据点所属的类别信息。使用yi作为对角线，建立m×m的对角线矩阵Y，即Yii表示Ai数据点所属的类别信息。
First, consider the case of linear SVM, which looks for a classification hyperplane  as follows:
首先，考虑线性SVM的情况，寻找分类超平面如下：

Here, ω Rn and b  Rn.  The soft interval hinge loss function is introduced to  measure the empirical risk. The SVM original optimization problem can be expressed as follows by introducing regularization term 1 ωTω and relaxation variable ξ = (ξ1, . . . , ξm):
这里，ω ∈ Rn，b ∈ R。引入软间隔铰链损失函数来衡量经验风险。通过引入正则化项1/2 ||ω||^2和松弛变量ξ = (ξ1, ..., ξm)，可以将SVM原始优化问题表示如下：

Here, C > 0 is the penalty coefficient, and minimized regularization term 1 ωTω is equivalent to the distance between the two maximized supporting hyperplanes, ωT 2+ b = 1 and ωT x + b = 1 and the structural risk minimized principle is implemented for the
original problem.
这里，C> 0是惩罚系数，最小化的正则化项1/2||ω||^2等价于两个最大支持超平面ωT x + b = 1和ωT x + b = -1之间的距离，实现了原始问题的结构风险最小化原则。
The dual problem obtained by Lagrange Multiplier Method is shown as follows:
通过拉格朗日乘数方法得到的对偶问题如下所示：

The solution of Lagrange Multiplier and further solution can be obtained by solving the above dual problem. Further, the solution of ω, b can be obtained. The new data points are classified by the following decision function.
通过解决上述对偶问题可以获得拉格朗日乘数的解和进一步的解法，进而可以获得ω，b的解。新的数据点根据以下决策函数进行分类。

For the nonlinear classification problem, it can be transformed into a linear classifica- tion problem in a certain dimensional feature space by nonlinear transformation, and the linear support vector machine can be learned in the high-dimensional feature space. It is
specifically expressed as. Where, ϕ(x) represents a mapping of x to a high-dimensional space. In the dual problem of linear support vector machine learning, the nonlinear support
vector machine is obtained by using kernel function instead of inner product. The dual problem of nonlinear SVM is as follows:
对于非线性分类问题，可以通过非线性变换将其转化为某个维度的特征空间中的线性分类问题，并在高维特征空间中学习线性支持向量机。具体表达式如下，其中，ϕ(x)表示将x映射到高维空间。在线性支持向量机学习的对偶问题中，通过使用核函数代替内积，可以得到非线性支持向量机。非线性SVM的对偶问题如下所示：
The decision function of nonlinear support vector machine is:
非线性支持向量机的决策函数为：

This part shows the classification performance comparison of SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AEBNSVM under the four hyperspectral datasets of Salinas-A, Pavia Center, Pavia
 


University and Kennedy Space Center. All the classification algorithms are carried out in a nonlinear way by using Gaussian kernel functions.
本部分展示了在Salinas-A、Pavia Center、Pavia University和Kennedy Space Center四个高光谱数据集下，SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类性能比较。所有分类算法都是通过使用高斯核函数以非线性方式进行的。
The division of training test set of Salinas-A is shown in Table 1
Salinas-A的训练测试集划分如表1所示：
Table 1. Ground truth classes for the Salinas-A scene and their respective samples number.
表1. Salinas-A场景的地面真实类别及其相应的样本数量。

Figure 5b–e are the recovery graphs of the prediction results of Salinas-A data using SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AENBSVM, respectively. If you look closely, you can see that the classification accuracy of AENSVM and AENBSVM has improved compared to SVM. The classification accuracy of each category is shown in Figure 6, and Figure 5 is analyzed in detail through Figure 6. AENSVM and AEBNSVM achieve 0.08%, 0.92% and 0.16% accu- racy improvement over SVM on Corn_senesced_green_weeds, Lettuce_romaine_4wk and Lettuce_romaine_6wk categories, respectively, where TWSVM has 1.11% better accuracy over SVM in the Lettuce_romaine_4wk category. AENSVM and AEBNSVM can balance empirical risk minimization and structural risk minimization by adjusting parameters c1 and c3. The classification results of TWSVM show that empirical risk minimization can make the Lettuce_romaine_4wk classification effect better. AENSVM and AEBNSVM also achieve better results than SVM by adjusting the degree of empirical risk minimization, and the characteristics of structural risk minimization also ensure the accuracy of other categories. As in the Lettuce_romaine_5wk category, the classification accuracy of SVM, AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.22% higher than that of TWSVM. It can be seen from Table 2 that the difficulty of Salinas-A classification is low, and SVM, TWSVM, AENSVM and AEBNSVM all get more than 99% classification accuracy. The overall classification accuracy of AENSVM and AEBNSVM is 0.14% higher than SVM and 0.32% higher than TWSVM, the Kappa coefficient is 0.18% higher than SVM and 0.39% higher than TWSVM.AENSVM; AEBNSVM non-parallel support vector machines are more suitable for data distribution under the premise of good SVM properties, so they get better experimental results.

图5b-e分别是使用SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AENBSVM对Salinas-A数据的预测结果的恢复图。仔细观察可以看出，与SVM相比，AENSVM和AENBSVM的分类精度有所提高。每个类别的分类精度如图6所示，并通过图6对图5进行详细分析。在Corn_senesced_green_weeds，Lettuce_romaine_4wk和Lettuce_romaine_6wk类别中，AENSVM和AEBNSVM相对于SVM分别具有0.08％，0.92％和0.16％的精度提高，而TWSVM中Lettuce_romaine_4wk类别比SVM更准确，提高了1.11％的精度。通过调整参数c1和c3，AENSVM和AEBNSVM可以平衡经验风险最小化和结构风险最小化。TWSVM的分类结果表明，经验风险最小化可以使Lettuce_romaine_4wk的分类效果更佳。通过调整经验风险最小化的程度，AENSVM和AEBNSVM也比SVM获得更好的结果，结构风险最小化的特点也确保了其他类别的准确性。在Lettuce_romaine_5wk类别中，SVM、AENSVM和AEBNSVM的分类精度比TWSVM高0.22％。从表2中可以看出，Salinas-A分类工作的难度较低，SVM、TWSVM、AENSVM和AEBNSVM均获得了超过99％的分类精度。AENSVM和AEBNSVM的
